scripts.build: react-scripts build && cp -r build/static webapp/react-app/static && cp build/index.html webapp/react-app/index.html && cp build/asset-manifest.json webapp/react-app/asset-manifest.json
scripts.deploy: npm run build && fiori deploy --config ui5-deploy.yaml
scripts.undeploy: npm run build && fiori undeploy --config ui5-deploy.yaml
scripts.deploy-test: npm run build && fiori deploy --config ui5-deploy.yaml --testMode true
